---
title: "Data 2026"
---

## Week 1

```{r, echo=FALSE}
set.seed(123)

# Create base data
n <- 20

data <- data.frame(
  group = rep(c("A", "B"), each = n/2),
  x = round(c(rnorm(n/2, mean = 10, sd = 2),
        rnorm(n/2, mean = 15, sd = 2)), 0),
  y = round(c(rnorm(n/2, mean = 20, sd = 3),
        rnorm(n/2, mean = 25, sd = 3)),0)
)

# Add an influential observation (far away)
outlier <- data.frame(
  group = "A",
  x = 40,
  y = 80
)

data <- rbind(data, outlier)

data |> knitr::kable()
```
